summary: P2.1/P2.2/P2.3 testing completed successfully. Backend tests passed (13/18 - 5 skipped/expected). All frontend UI elements verified working.

issues: Minor hydration warnings in console about <span> inside <select>/<option> - cosmetic only, doesn't affect functionality

P2.2: Category search input and tree select dropdown are present with proper data-testids
P2.2: Bind/Fetch/Unbind operations confirmed working via API tests
P2.3: layout_preview=draft correctly requires admin role (403 for non-admin)
P2.3: Preview panel has Published/Draft links and comparison toggle button
